text:
アークスは強い相手がいれば
戦ってみたくなるんでしょう？

料理人も同じ。
とってもおいしい食材があれば
調理してみたくなるのも当然なの。

私の料理人としての直感が告げてる。
ペンドランの尾肉はとっても
おいしいはずだ、って。

だからお願い！
食材を集めてき

So as an ARKS operative, does the idea of
there being a tough enemy out there kind
of make you want to try facing it?

Well, chefs have it the same. If you know
about a tasty ingredient, you've just got to
try cooking it up in something.

And my chef's instincts are buzzing over
Pendran tail meat. It's going to be delicious...
I just know it.

And so here I am, asking your help once again!
Help me fulfill my ingredient dreams!
